preconditions: TASK-000001 is independently accepted and WP-002 is merged
the probe evidence and operation catalog schemas are reviewed
each platform adapter has a dependency native-code unsafe-code and license review before implementation
the first platform run is labeled a research laboratory rather than a product support commitment
acceptance_criteria: one versioned probe catalog defines every attempted operation expected outcome and evidence class
an unsandboxed control run proves that the harness detects permitted operations rather than fabricating denials
sandboxed runs bind evidence to build platform policy process identity and probe version
all expected-deny operations fail through the operating-system boundary rather than application-level stubs
allowed operations are enumerated and limited to broker-provided handles or explicit platform grants
unsupported platform primitives are reported as unsupported and never counted as a pass
evidence contains no secrets user paths profile data page content or stable machine identifiers
CI detects unexplained capability increases and policy drift
Linux macOS and Windows results remain separate until each platform has complete native evidence
documentation states residual gaps and no production sandbox claim is made
negative_tests: dynamic library loading from an untrusted path
inherited unexpected handle or file descriptor

rollback.strategy: close the stacked pull request or revert its reviewed commits; no sandbox result may remain promoted after rollback
evidence_required: probe binaries schemas platform adapters and claims are removed or restored to the prior reviewed state
